## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] Changes verified locally at `localhost:3000`
- [ ] Mobile layout checked at ~375px width (if UI was changed)
- [ ] All new visible text is in `content/copy.js` (not hardcoded in components)
- [ ] All new animations use variants from `lib/motion.js`
- [ ] No `.env` files, API keys, or credentials in the diff
- [ ] No new dependencies added without prior discussion
